headline: Trimble Inc.’s (TRMB) Subsidiary Launches Advanced Risk Intelligence Platform
summary: Trimble Inc. (NASDAQ:TRMB) is one of the 10 oversold stocks offering high upside. On June 18, Trimble Inc.’s (NASDAQ:TRMB) subsidiary, Document Crunch, which offers AI risk intelligence solutions for projects, revealed the launch of its advanced platform that enables the transformation of a single-document review into key risk intelligence at a project level. The company […]
